content_body: We came from metro Atlanta to spend our family Thanksgiving weekend here since our children go to the in-laws for the actual day.  We've done this for three years so far and this was the ABSOLUTE BEST place we've found!  We cooked alot and enjoyed the fully equipped kitchen - even a meat thermometer which was needed!!  We took family portraits in the treehouse and loved having so many bathrooms, too!  The house is beautifully decorated and thoughtfully designed and we appreciated the owners sharing it.  May you enjoy many years of happy times here, and we hope to come back again next year.  Happy Thanksgiving!
title: Wonderful Holiday in the Best Blue Ridge Cabin EVER
